page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.12xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated physical cores and 48 vCPUs, utilizing the Intel Xeon 8369HB processor running at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each vCPU maps directly to a physical core, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead.

The instance is configured with 384.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

This hardware profile is optimized for memory-intensive workloads that benefit from dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density. Suitable workloads include in-memory databases, large-scale enterprise applications, and memory-bound data processing tasks where consistent single-threaded CPU performance is required.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.12xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 48 dedicated physical Intel Xeon 8369HB CPU cores operating at 3.3 GHz, with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio that eliminates hyperthreading resource sharing. The instance provides 384.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB per core memory density. It features no local storage or GPU hardware, relying on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. This resource configuration is designed for memory-intensive enterprise applications, in-memory databases, and data processing tasks requiring dedicated compute allocation and high memory capacity.
